args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as sales_amount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY sales_amount DESC LIMIT 5;

val_args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as sales_amount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY sales_amount DESC LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) as clean_owner_id, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as sales_amount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '')) WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY clean_owner_id ORDER BY sales_amount DESC LIMIT 5;

val_args.query: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) as clean_owner_id, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as sales_amount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '')) WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY clean_owner_id ORDER BY sales_amount DESC LIMIT 5;
